recording_priorities: Ch 7: Consideration (core doctrine, high student difficulty)
Ch 17: Parol Evidence Rule (9-video playlist exists but no single overview)
Ch 19: Conditions (complex topic, students struggle with condition vs promise)
Ch 24: Expectation Damages (Hadley v. Baxendale — foundational)
